title: Legacy backlog batch 9 dispositioned
body: Closed claim 71a9edfb after processing legacy backlog batch 9 in place. Dispositions: 1 graduated, 2 duplicate, 2 stale-withdrawn. Permanent rule graduation: .agent/rules/no-verify-requires-fresh-authorisation.md now makes hook bypass owner-initiated only; agents surface hook output/tree state and do not propose, request, offer, or frame bypass. Verification: targeted markdownlint pass, git diff --check pass, strict-hard SOFT with 20 soft, 22 healthy, 8 ready-empty, hard 0, critical 0. No archive, split, shard, rename, move, or new buffer file.
